name: AptarGroup, Inc.
description: AptarGroup, Inc. is a global leader in the design and manufacturing of a broad range of drug delivery, consumer product dispensing, and active material science solutions and services. The company serves a variety of end markets, including pharmaceutical, beauty, personal care, home care, food, and beverage. Headquartered in Crystal Lake, Illinois, Aptar operates manufacturing facilities across North America, Europe, Asia, and South America, providing innovative packaging and dispensing systems that enhance the safety, convenience, and functionality of everyday products.
